scenarios.title: Computer Vision Modeling and Augmentation
scenarios.when_to_read: Image augmentation, PIL/Pillow operations, vision datasets/transforms, classification and detection models, segmentation, YOLO/SAM/OpenMMLab workflows, and model export.
scenarios.role: Use `torchvision` when working with TorchVision models, weights, transforms, TVTensors, datasets, image IO, visualization utilities, vision ops, detection helpers, or official reference training workflows.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `torchvision` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: datasets io utils, models and weights, ops and detection, training references, and transforms and tv tensors.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `torchvision` when the request names `torchvision`, centers on working with TorchVision models, weights, transforms, TVTensors, datasets, image IO, visualization utilities, vision ops, detection helpers, or official reference training workflows, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in computer vision modeling and augmentation. Then route to datasets I/O utils, models and weights, ops and detection, or training references when those focused workflows match.
